events.label: assistant
events.text:
Diagnosed from the image: micron gauge read 475 at isolation (t=0) and 3138 at t=10 min — a ~2,660 micron rise with cores pulled and gauge at the far port (correct test setup). That magnitude of climb indicates an active leak rather than normal moisture off-gassing (which should plateau under ~500-1000 microns), most likely a defective braze joint given the brazing & evacuation scope.

Wrote `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `risk: high`, `value: 3138`, `component_conditions: ["installed-defective"]`, and corrective actions (nitrogen/leak-detector search, re-braze, re-evacuate and retest before charging).
